title: Port Http Transport
description: TypeScript surface for **Port Http Transport** on `SpecdDataPort`, mirroring the HTTP routes in the paired `api:routes-*` group. UI hooks call these methods; adapters implement them over HTTP or IPC.
context: TypeScript surface for **Port Http Transport** on `SpecdDataPort`, mirroring the HTTP routes in the paired `api:routes-*` group. UI hooks call these methods; adapters implement them over HTTP or IPC.

rules.requirement: transport normalizes API base URL and /v1 prefix
rules: The transport MUST trim trailing slashes on the configured base URL and MUST prefix relative paths with `/v1` when the deployment uses the versioned API root.

rules.requirement: transport sets JSON accept and allows auth injection
rules: Requests MUST send `Accept: application/json`. Adapters MAY inject additional headers (for example `Authorization`) via a hook or wrapper.
Every request MUST accept an optional `AbortSignal` so React hooks can cancel in-flight fetches on unmount or tab close.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: transport normalizes API base URL and /v1 prefix
scenarios.name: Trailing slash is trimmed from base URL

scenarios.requirement: transport normalizes API base URL and /v1 prefix
scenarios.name: Relative paths gain /v1 prefix
then: AND legacy unprefixed paths are not used

scenarios.requirement: transport normalizes API base URL and /v1 prefix
scenarios.name: Absolute paths in tests are rejected
when: caller passes full URL without base merge

scenarios.requirement: transport sets JSON accept and allows auth injection
scenarios.name: Accept application/json on every request

scenarios.requirement: transport sets JSON accept and allows auth injection
scenarios.name: Auth injector adds Authorization when configured
then: AND injector does not validate token

scenarios.requirement: transport sets JSON accept and allows auth injection
scenarios.name: No Authorization when profile has no token
then: AND call still succeeds against disabled auth

scenarios.name: Global poll passes shared abort controller
when: new poll tick aborts previous fetch
